summary: Iteration 130: Cruscotto Finanziario Artigiano (Financial Dashboard) - All tests PASS. Backend endpoint GET /api/dashboard/cruscotto-finanziario returns correct JSON structure with all required keys. Frontend EBITDAPage renders correctly with 4 tabs (Panoramica, IVA Trimestrale, Scadenzario, Margini Commesse), Semaforo liquidità displays with correct color coding, and tab switching works perfectly.

iva_trimestri.result: PASS - All 4 quarters with correct structure

tabs.panoramica: PASS - Tab found and displays Semaforo, Cash Flow, Aging, IVA Quick
tabs.iva_trimestrale: PASS - Tab switches correctly, shows chart and quarterly cards
tabs.scadenzario: PASS - Tab switches correctly, shows Clienti/Fornitori toggle
tabs.margini_commesse: PASS - Tab switches correctly, shows Top/Bottom margin cards

semaforo_liquidita.message: Margine risicato — monitora gli incassi attentamente

frontend_tests.empty_state_handling: PASS - All components render correctly with zero/empty data

critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint correctly calculates IVA quarterly from invoices and fatture_ricevute collections
Semaforo logic is sound: verde (surplus > 20%), giallo (marginal), rosso (deficit)
Cash flow preview correctly aggregates upcoming receivables/payables by due dates
All data-testid attributes properly placed for UI testing
Empty data handling is robust - no errors with empty collections
seed_data_creation: Test user and session created/cleaned up automatically during test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial dashboard (Cruscotto Finanziario) feature complete and tested. Endpoint /api/dashboard/cruscotto-finanziario returns comprehensive financial data. Frontend page at /ebitda (named Analisi Finanziaria in sidebar) has 4 tabs. All features work with empty data (returns zeros). For testing with real data, seed invoices (emitted), fatture_ricevute (received), and commesse collections with proper date ranges and payment statuses.
